name: ListEvents
description: Retrieve a list of events for the user with a given criteria - start and end datetimes, title of the meeting, attendee emails etc. This returns only the master event for recurring meetings.

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T09:00:00Z'). Default : user'sCurrentTime.

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T17:00:00Z'). Default : currentTime + 90 days.

timeZone.description: timezone for the event (e.g., 'Pacific Standard Time'). Default : current user's timezone.

select.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return

orderby.description: Property name to sort results by (e.g., 'displayName', 'jobTitle'). Meeting startTime is specified if not used.

name: ListCalendarView
description: Retrieve events from a user's calendar view with recurring events expanded into individual instances. Use this whenever you need to find user's meetings in general, or one meeting instance of a recurring event (not master series) occurring in a time window before modifying, updating, or canceling a meeting.

userIdentifier.description: User identifier - can be email, Entra ID (GUID), display name, or 'me' for current user. Defaults to 'me' if not specified.

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T09:00:00'). Default: current time of current user

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T17:00:00'). Default: current time of current user + 15 days

timeZone.description: Time zone for the event (e.g., 'Pacific Standard Time'). Default : current user's timezone.

subject.description: Search term to filter events by subject/title. Use this to find specific meetings by name.

select.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return

orderby.description: Property name to sort results by (e.g., 'start/dateTime'). Default is 'start/dateTime'.

name: CreateEvent
description: Create a new calendar event. Can provide names or email addresses for attendees (names will be resolved to emails). If time is provided, schedules even if there are conflicts. Default duration is 30 minutes. All events automatically include a Teams meeting link. Supports recurring events.

attendeeEmails.description: List of email or userPrincipalNames of attendees.Please fetch the email addresses of the users before making this call.

timeZone.description: Time zone for the event (e.g., 'Pacific Standard Time'). Default is current user's timezone.

bodyContentType.description: Body content type: 'Text' or 'HTML'. Default is 'Text'.

isOnlineMeeting.description: Whether to create as an online meeting. Defaults to true.

showAs.description: Free/busy status to show: 'free', 'tentative', 'busy', 'oof', 'workingElsewhere', 'unknown'. Default is 'busy'.

responseRequested.description: Whether a response is requested from invitees. Default is true.

name: UpdateEvent
description: Update an existing calendar event. Can add or remove attendees by providing names or email addresses (names will be resolved to emails automatically).

eventId.description: The ID of the event to update

startDateTime.description: Updated start date/time in ISO 8601 format

endDateTime.description: Updated end date/time in ISO 8601 format

timeZone.description: Updated Time zone for the event (e.g., 'Pacific Standard Time').

attendeesToAdd.description: List of attendee email addresses or names to add

attendeesToRemove.description: List of attendee email addresses or names to remove

name: DeleteEventById
description: Delete a calendar event. Retrieve the event details first to extract the ID, then pass it to be deleted.

eventId.description: The ID of the event to delete.

name: FindMeetingTimes
description: Find meeting times that work for all attendees. Suggests meeting times based on organizer and attendee availability. Can provide names or email addresses for attendees (names will be resolved to emails).

userIdentifier.description: User identifier for the organizer - can be email, Entra ID (GUID), display name, or 'me' for current user. Defaults to 'me' if not specified.

attendeeEmails.description: List of attendee email addresses or names

meetingDuration.description: Meeting duration in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 'PT1H' for 1 hour, 'PT30M' for 30 minutes). Required.

startDateTime.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T09:00:00'). Defaults to current time.

endDateTime.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-01-15T17:00:00'). Defaults to start time + 7 days.

timeZone.description: Time zone (e.g., 'Pacific Standard Time'). Default is current user's timezone.

isOrganizerOptional.description: Whether the organizer's attendance is optional. Default is false.

returnSuggestionReasons.description: Whether to return reasons for each suggestion. Default is true.

responseTemplate: Meeting time suggestions found for duration {{meetingDuration}} (mock).

name: AcceptEvent
description: Accept a calendar event invitation. Optionally include a comment with the acceptance.

eventId.description: The ID of the event to accept

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the acceptance

sendResponse.description: Whether to send a response to the organizer. Default is true.

name: TentativelyAcceptEvent
description: Tentatively accept a calendar event invitation. Optionally include a comment with the tentative acceptance.

eventId.description: The ID of the event to tentatively accept

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the tentative acceptance

sendResponse.description: Whether to send a response to the organizer. Defaults to true.

name: DeclineEvent
description: Decline a calendar event invitation. Optionally include a comment with the decline.

eventId.description: The ID of the event to decline

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the decline

sendResponse.description: Whether to send a response to the organizer. Defaults to true.

name: CancelEvent
description: Cancel a calendar event. Only the event organizer can cancel an event. This will send cancellation notifications to all attendees.

eventId.description: The ID of the event to cancel

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the cancellation

name: ForwardEvent
description: Forward a calendar event to other recipients. Can provide names or email addresses for recipients (names will be resolved to emails).

eventId.description: The ID of the event to forward

recipientEmails.description: List of recipient email addresses or names to forward the event to

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the forwarded event

name: GetUserDateAndTimeZoneSettings
description: Get date and timezone settings for a user including time zone, date format, time format, working hours, and language preferences. Can provide name, email address, or use 'me' for current user.

userIdentifier.description: User identifier - can be email, Entra ID (GUID), display name, or 'me' for current user. Defaults to 'me' if not specified.

name: GetRooms
description: Get all the meeting rooms defined in the user's tenant. Returns room names and email addresses.
